negative.ex: Don't have a negative attitude about the task.
negative.exZh: 不要對這個任務有負面態度。

nervous.ex: Mary feels nervous before her English presentation.
nervous.exZh: 瑪麗在英語演講前感到緊張。

notice.ex: Did you notice the new student in our class?
notice.exZh: 你注意到我們班級的新同學嗎？

opportunity.ex: This is a good opportunity to learn new skills.
opportunity.exZh: 這是學習新技能的好機會。

patient.ex: The patient waited patiently for the doctor.

perform.ex: She performs excellently in school concerts.
perform.exZh: 她在學校音樂會上表演很出色。

personality.ex: Her friendly personality makes everyone like her.
personality.exZh: 她友善的個性使每個人都喜歡她。

polite.ex: A polite child always says thank you and please.
polite.exZh: 有禮貌的孩子總是說謝謝和請。

pollution.ex: Air pollution is a serious problem in big cities.
pollution.exZh: 空氣污染是大城市的一個嚴重問題。

positive.ex: Try to think positive even when things are difficult.
positive.exZh: 即使事情很困難，也要嘗試保持積極思維。

prepare.ex: We need to prepare well for the final exam.
prepare.exZh: 我們需要為期末考試做好充分準備。

pressure.ex: High school students often feel pressure about grades.
pressure.exZh: 高中學生經常感受到來自成績的壓力。

prevent.ex: Good health habits prevent many diseases.
prevent.exZh: 良好的健康習慣可以預防許多疾病。

probably.ex: It will probably rain tomorrow, so bring an umbrella.
probably.exZh: 明天可能會下雨，所以帶把傘。

progress.ex: He has made great progress in English this year.
progress.exZh: 他今年在英語方面取得了很大進步。

project.ex: Our science project is due next Monday.
project.exZh: 我們的科學專案下週一就要交。

protect.ex: We must protect the environment for future generations.
protect.exZh: 我們必須為子孫後代保護環境。

provide.ex: The school provides free breakfast for all students.
provide.exZh: 學校為所有學生提供免費早餐。

punish.ex: Teachers sometimes punish students for misbehavior.
punish.exZh: 老師有時會因為不當行為懲罰學生。

realize.ex: I finally realized the importance of studying hard.
realize.exZh: 我終於意識到努力學習的重要性。

recently.ex: She moved to a new house recently.

recycle.ex: We should recycle plastic bags to help Earth.
recycle.exZh: 我們應該回收塑膠袋來幫助地球。

reduce.ex: We need to reduce the amount of trash we produce.
reduce.exZh: 我們需要減少產生的垃圾量。

refuse.ex: He refused to eat vegetables at dinner time.
refuse.exZh: 他拒絕在晚餐時吃蔬菜。

relationship.ex: A good relationship between friends is very important.
relationship.exZh: 朋友之間的良好關係非常重要。

relaxed.ex: Tom feels relaxed after a day at the beach.
relaxed.exZh: 湯姆在海灘待了一天後感到放鬆。

respect.ex: We should respect our teachers and parents always.
respect.exZh: 我們應該始終尊重我們的老師和父母。

responsible.ex: A responsible student always finishes homework on time.
responsible.exZh: 負責任的學生總是按時完成功課。

result.ex: The result of the game was a tie between teams.
result.exZh: 比賽的結果是兩隊平手。

return.ex: She will return home from school at five o'clock.
return.exZh: 她會在五點鐘從學校返回家裡。

review.ex: Let's review the grammar before the test tomorrow.
review.exZh: 讓我們在明天考試前複習語法。

role.ex: She played the main role in the school play.
role.exZh: 她在學校話劇中扮演主角。

scene.ex: The scene where they meet is very romantic.
scene.exZh: 他們見面的場景非常浪漫。

schedule.ex: Check your class schedule to find your next class.
schedule.exZh: 查看你的課程表找到你的下一堂課。

secret.ex: I have a secret that I cannot tell anyone.
secret.exZh: 我有一個不能告訴任何人的秘密。

select.ex: You can select any toppings you want for pizza.
select.exZh: 你可以為披薩選擇任何你想要的配料。

serious.ex: He takes his studies very seriously every day.
serious.exZh: 他每天都很認真地對待他的學習。

several.ex: There are several reasons why I like this movie.
several.exZh: 我喜歡這部電影有幾個原因。

share.ex: I like to share my lunch with my best friend.
share.exZh: 我喜歡和我最要好的朋友分享午餐。

situation.ex: The situation in the classroom became very serious.
situation.exZh: 教室裡的情況變得非常嚴肅。

skill.ex: Playing basketball requires good skill and practice.
skill.exZh: 打籃球需要良好的技能和練習。

smart.ex: Tom is a smart student who always gets good grades.
smart.exZh: 湯姆是一個聰明的學生，總是得到好成績。

solve.ex: We can solve this math problem together very easily.
solve.exZh: 我們可以很輕鬆地一起解決這道數學問題。

spirit.ex: The team's winning spirit helped them become champions.
spirit.exZh: 球隊的必勝精神幫助他們成為冠軍。

stress.ex: Too much stress makes students feel tired and worried.
stress.exZh: 太多壓力讓學生感到疲倦和擔心。

strict.ex: My teacher is strict, but we all respect her rules.
strict.exZh: 我的老師很嚴格，但我們都尊重她的規則。

success.ex: Hard work leads to success in school and life.
success.exZh: 努力工作在學校和生活中導致成功。

suggest.ex: The teacher suggests that we study every night.
suggest.exZh: 老師建議我們每晚都要學習。

support.ex: Your family will support you in your dreams.
support.exZh: 你的家人會在你的夢想中支持你。

suppose.ex: I suppose you will come to the party tomorrow.
suppose.exZh: 我認為你明天會來參加派對。

technology.ex: Technology changes our lives in many useful ways.
technology.exZh: 科技以許多有用的方式改變我們的生活。

therefore.ex: The restaurant was closed; therefore, we went home.
therefore.exZh: 餐廳關門了；因此，我們回家了。

though.ex: Though the test was difficult, I passed it.
though.exZh: 雖然測驗很難，但我通過了它。

through.ex: We walked through the park after school today.
through.exZh: 放學後我們今天穿過公園走著。

throughout.ex: She stayed happy throughout the entire difficult year.
throughout.exZh: 在整個困難的一年中她始終保持快樂。

toward.ex: The students walked toward the playground excited.
toward.exZh: 學生們興高采烈地朝操場走去。

tradition.ex: My family has a tradition of eating dumplings.
tradition.exZh: 我的家人有吃餃子的傳統。

trust.ex: I trust my best friend with all my secrets.
trust.exZh: 我信任我最好的朋友關於所有我的祕密。

truth.ex: The truth is that everyone makes mistakes sometimes.
truth.exZh: 真相是每個人有時都會犯錯誤。

typical.ex: That is a typical rainy day in Taiwan summer.
typical.exZh: 那是台灣夏天典型的下雨天。

unfortunately.ex: Unfortunately, I could not attend the concert yesterday.
unfortunately.exZh: 不幸地，我昨天無法參加演唱會。

unique.ex: Each person has their unique talent and special skill.
unique.exZh: 每個人都有自己獨特的才能和特殊技能。

upset.ex: Mom was upset when I did not do my homework.
upset.exZh: 當我沒有做功課時媽媽感到心煩。

value.ex: Education has great value for our future success.
value.exZh: 教育對我們的未來成功有很大價值。

various.ex: There are various kinds of fruit in the market.
various.exZh: 市場上有各種各樣的水果。

view.ex: Everyone has a different view about this important issue.
view.exZh: 每個人對這個重要問題都有不同的看法。

volunteer.ex: She volunteers at the hospital every weekend to help.
volunteer.exZh: 她每個週末在醫院做志工來幫助。

waste.ex: Do not waste water and electricity in your home.
waste.exZh: 不要在家裡浪費水和電。

whether.ex: Whether it rains or not, we will have the game.
whether.exZh: 無論是否下雨，我們都會進行比賽。

widely.ex: English is widely spoken around the whole world.
widely.exZh: 英語在世界各地被廣泛使用。

willing.ex: I am willing to help you with your English homework.
willing.exZh: 我願意幫助你做英文功課。

wisdom.ex: We need wisdom to make good decisions in life.
wisdom.exZh: 我們需要智慧在生活中做出好決定。

within.ex: You must finish your work within two hours today.
within.exZh: 你必須在兩個小時內今天完成你的工作。

without.ex: It is impossible to live without food and water.
without.exZh: 沒有食物和水不可能活著。

absent.ex: Tom was absent from school today.

accident.ex: There was a car accident near my home.
accident.exZh: 我家附近發生了一場車禍。

action.ex: We need to take action right now.
action.exZh: 我們現在就需要採取行動。

active.ex: My sister is very active in sports.
active.exZh: 我姊姊在運動方面很積極。

activity.ex: Swimming is my favorite summer activity.
activity.exZh: 游泳是我最喜歡的夏日活動。

actress.exZh: 那位女演員演過很多電視節目。

actually.ex: I actually finished my homework already.
actually.exZh: 我其實已經做完功課了。

address.ex: Please write your home address here.
address.exZh: 請在這裡寫下你的住家地址。

admire.ex: I really admire my English teacher.
admire.exZh: 我真的很欽佩我的英文老師。

adult.ex: Every adult must pay for the ticket.
adult.exZh: 每位成人都必須付票錢。

advertisement.ex: I saw a funny advertisement on TV.
advertisement.exZh: 我在電視上看到一則有趣的廣告。

advice.ex: My mother gave me good advice.
advice.exZh: 我媽媽給了我很好的勸告。

affect.ex: The rain may affect our school trip.

against.ex: He leaned against the classroom wall.

aim.ex: My aim is to pass the exam.

airplane.ex: The airplane is flying over the city.

airport.exZh: 我們在機場接到了我叔叔。

alarm.ex: The fire alarm rang very loudly.
alarm.exZh: 火災警報器響得很大聲。

album.exZh: 她把照片放進她的相簿裡。

alive.ex: The little bird is still alive.

alone.ex: She likes to study alone at home.

along.ex: We walked along the river yesterday.

already.ex: I have already eaten my lunch.

altogether.ex: The books cost five hundred dollars altogether.

ambulance.ex: The ambulance took him to the hospital.

among.ex: She sat among her good friends.
among.exZh: 她坐在她的好朋友之間。

ancient.ex: We learned about ancient China today.
ancient.exZh: 我們今天學到了古代中國。

angel.ex: The girl drew a beautiful angel.
angel.exZh: 那女孩畫了一個美麗的天使。

anger.ex: He could not hide his anger.

angry.ex: My dad was angry about the mess.
angry.exZh: 我爸爸對這團亂很生氣。

ankle.ex: I hurt my ankle during the game.
ankle.exZh: 我在比賽中弄傷了腳踝。

another.ex: Can I have another piece of cake?
another.exZh: 我可以再吃另一塊蛋糕嗎？

ant.ex: A small ant is on my desk.
ant.exZh: 一隻小螞蟻在我的桌上。

anything.ex: I didn't buy anything at the store.
anything.exZh: 我在店裡沒有買任何東西。

apartment.ex: They live in a small apartment.
apartment.exZh: 他們住在一間小公寓裡。

apologize.ex: You should apologize to your friend.
apologize.exZh: 你應該向你的朋友道歉。

area.ex: This area has many good restaurants.
area.exZh: 這個地區有許多好餐廳。

arm.ex: He broke his arm last week.

armchair.exZh: 爺爺在扶手椅上睡著了。

around.ex: There are many shops around here.

arrange.ex: Let's arrange the chairs for the party.
arrange.exZh: 我們來安排派對的椅子吧。

art.ex: I love drawing in art class at school.
art.exZh: 我喜歡在學校的美術課畫畫。

artist.ex: My sister wants to be a famous artist.
artist.exZh: 我姊姊想成為一位有名的藝術家。

as.ex: She works as a teacher in our town.

asleep.ex: The baby is asleep on the soft bed.
asleep.exZh: 嬰兒在柔軟的床上睡著了。

assistant.ex: The shop assistant helped me find a shirt.
assistant.exZh: 店員幫我找到一件襯衫。

assume.ex: I assume she is at home now.

attack.ex: The dog's attack scared the little boy.
attack.exZh: 那隻狗的攻擊嚇到了小男孩。

august.ex: My birthday is in August every year.
august.exZh: 我的生日每年都在八月。

aunt.ex: My aunt baked a cake for us.
aunt.exZh: 我姑媽為我們烤了一個蛋糕。

autumn.ex: The leaves turn red in autumn.

available.ex: This book is not available right now.

away.ex: My friend lives far away from school.
away.exZh: 我朋友住得離學校很遠。

baby.ex: The baby is crying for her mother.

baby sitter.exZh: 我們的保母陪我們玩遊戲。

backward(s).ex: He took two steps backward(s) slowly.
backward(s).exZh: 他慢慢地向後退了兩步。

badminton.ex: We play badminton in the park together.

bag.ex: I put my books in my school bag.
bag.exZh: 我把書放進我的書包裡。

bake.ex: My mom likes to bake bread on Sunday.
bake.exZh: 我媽媽喜歡在星期天烤麵包。

balcony.ex: She waters the flowers on the balcony.

balloon.ex: The child held a red balloon tightly.
balloon.exZh: 那個小孩緊緊握著一顆紅氣球。

banana.ex: I eat a banana for breakfast every day.
banana.exZh: 我每天早餐吃一根香蕉。

band.ex: My brother plays drums in a band.

barbecue.exZh: 我們今晚在後院火烤肉。

barber.exZh: 理髮師把我爸爸的頭髮剪短了。

bark.ex: Dogs often bark at strangers loudly.
bark.exZh: 狗常常對陌生人大聲吠叫。

base.ex: Math is the base of many subjects.
base.exZh: 數學是許多科目的基礎。

baseball.ex: We watch a baseball game after school.
baseball.exZh: 我們放學後看一場棒球比賽。

basement.ex: We keep old boxes in the basement.
basement.exZh: 我們把舊箱子放在地下室。

basket.ex: She put the apples in the basket.

bat.ex: A bat flew out of the dark cave.
bat.exZh: 一隻蝙蝠從黑暗的洞穴飛出來。

bath.ex: I take a warm bath before bed.

bathe.ex: She bathes her little dog every week.
bathe.exZh: 她每週幫她的小狗洗澡。

bathroom.ex: May I go to the bathroom, please?

beach.ex: We build sandcastles on the beach.

bean.ex: I don't like green beans very much.

bear.ex: The big bear is sleeping in winter.

beard.ex: My grandpa has a long white beard.
beard.exZh: 我爺爺有一把長長的白鬍鬚。

beat.ex: The rain beat against my window all night.
beat.exZh: 雨整晚拍打著我的窗戶。

beautiful.ex: The garden looks very beautiful in spring.
beautiful.exZh: 這座花園在春天看起來很美麗。

beauty.ex: We enjoyed the beauty of the mountains.

bed.ex: I go to bed at ten every night.

bedroom.exZh: 我的臥室有一扇藍色大窗戶。

bee.ex: A bee is flying around the flower.
bee.exZh: 一隻蜜蜂在花朵旁飛來飛去。

beef.ex: My father cooked beef noodles for dinner.
beef.exZh: 我爸爸煮了牛肉麵當晚餐。

beer.ex: My uncle drinks beer after work.

beginner.ex: I am still a beginner at the piano.
beginner.exZh: 我彈鋼琴還是個初學者。

beginning.ex: At the beginning, the movie was boring.
beginning.exZh: 一開始，這部電影很無聊。

behave.ex: The students behave well in class.
behave.exZh: 學生們在課堂上表現良好。

behind.ex: My little brother is hiding behind.

bell.ex: The school bell rings at eight every morning.
bell.exZh: 學校的鈴每天早上八點響。

below.ex: My classroom is on the floor below.
below.exZh: 我的教室在下面那一層。

belt.ex: He wears a black belt with his pants.
belt.exZh: 他繫著一條黑色皮帶配長褲。

bench.ex: We sat on a bench in the park.
bench.exZh: 我們坐在公園的長凳上。

besides.ex: I like math; besides, I enjoy science.
besides.exZh: 我喜歡數學；此外，我也喜歡科學。

beyond.ex: The store is just beyond the school gate.
beyond.exZh: 那家店就在校門超出一點的地方。

bicycle.ex: I ride my bicycle to school every day.

bill.ex: My father paid the dinner bill last night.
bill.exZh: 昨晚我爸爸付了晚餐的帳單。

biology.ex: We study plants and animals in biology class.
biology.exZh: 我們在生物學課學習植物和動物。

bite.ex: Be careful, the dog may bite you.
bite.exZh: 小心，那隻狗可能會咬你。

bitter.ex: Losing the game was a bitter memory.
bitter.exZh: 輸掉比賽是個痛苦的回憶。

blackboard.ex: The teacher wrote the date on the blackboard.
blackboard.exZh: 老師把日期寫在黑板上。

blame.ex: Please don't blame me for the mistake.
blame.exZh: 請不要為這個錯誤責怪我。

blank.ex: Write your name on the blank line.

blanket.ex: She covered the baby with a warm blanket.
blanket.exZh: 她用溫暖的毯子蓋住寶寶。

blind.ex: The blind man walks with a white cane.
blind.exZh: 那位失明的男士用白色拐杖走路。

block.ex: The library is two blocks from here.

blood.ex: He gave some blood at the hospital.

bloody.ex: The movie had too many bloody scenes.
bloody.exZh: 那部電影有太多血腥的畫面。

blow.ex: The strong wind can blow the leaves away.

boat.ex: We took a boat across the lake.

bow.ex: He shot an arrow with his new bow.

underwear.exZh: 我把內衣褲放進抽屜裡。

waiter.exZh: 服務生為我們端來一些冷水。

wash.ex: Please wash your hands before dinner.

water.ex: I drink a glass of water every morning.

wear.ex: I wear a school uniform every day.

wedding.exZh: 上週日我們去參加阿姨的結婚儀式。

wednesday.ex: We have a math test on Wednesday.
wednesday.exZh: 我們星期三有數學考試。

welcome.exZh: 我們歡迎所有新同學加入我們班。

west.ex: The sun goes down in the west.

wet.ex: My shoes are wet from the rain.

what.ex: What do you want for lunch today?

which.ex: Which color do you like better?

while.ex: I read a book while my brother slept.

whole.ex: I ate the whole pizza by myself.

why.ex: Why are you late for class today?

wife.ex: His wife is a kind nurse.

wind.ex: The cold wind made me shake.

windy.ex: It is very windy outside today.

wine.ex: My father drinks a little wine at dinner.
wine.exZh: 我爸爸晚餐時喝一點酒。

wing.exZh: 那隻鳥傷了牠的左翅膀。

yet.ex: I have not finished my homework yet.

yummy.exZh: 我媽媽做的蛋糕好好吃。

website.ex: This website has many fun games.

laptop.exZh: 她用筆記型電腦做功課。
